rows.asset_name: ESTEE LAUDER CO INC CL A(EL)

uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED Schedule B grid: each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). Rows carry owner (SP; no EIF markers this sheet) + asset name + ticker + P type; middle is an unlabeled amount-of-transaction bucket matrix (X marks are dark bars, two checked rows visible across most columns); dates are the bottom row (all 12/27/2019). Amount buckets and cap_gain_over_200 rows unlabeled on this sheet (labels off-page) and degraded, so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx. owner/asset/ticker/tx_type/date captured. 'M and R Schedule B' = M & R Trust Partnership Schedule B.
uncertainties.note: downstream: amounts require the row-label key from the schedule header page to resolve the transposed matrix
